name: Frank's Sure-Kill Venison Chili
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sugar (more or less to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the venison (or other wild game) with some butter. Venison tends to be somewhat dry, so add butter as needed.
2. Drain well and transfer to a 6-8 quart slow cooker or large pot on the stove.
3. Add the remaining ingredients, mixing well. Add only enough water to prevent burning.
4. Cook covered for 2 hours at a boil. Reduce heat to about 200 degrees Fahrenheit and cook until thick consistency is reached.
5. Serve topped with shredded cheese of choice and fresh cornbread.
6. Freezes well if leftovers remain.
